title: JustTimm's Custom Additions
description: Custom Additions adds random items and movie/series/game collections with OptiFine CIT.
body:
[![Button](https://i.imgur.com/197JTrg.png)](https://server.pro/?ref=JustTimmsAdditions "Sponsored by Server.pro") --------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------- ### We are rebranding this resource pack, making it work without optifine or CIT Resewn and making a datapack so this resource pack works in survival without renaming. It will take a while until it's finished so if you want to keep up to date with the latest news then join our [Discord Server](https://discord.gg/runTSv2)!

Custom Additions is a Resource Pack that uses OptiFine's/CIT Resewn's Custom Item Textures *(CIT)* feature to add many item and armor textures to the game. I want to add many big updates and the resource pack also includes many collections with items based on different games, movies or series. You can find Custom Additions on [Modrinth](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/justtimms-custom-additions) and [PlanetMinecraft](https://www.planetminecraft.com/texture-pack/justtimm-s-custom-additions/)! Items: **338**
You can find all the items in the [documentation](https://drive.google.com/file/d/1c1bp56e_AJ-xW5XDIwqWsIzhILaA5YN8/view?usp=sharing)! ---------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
Download **OptiFine** or **CIT Resewn** for this Resource Pack to work properly. ---------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
--------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------- **Keep in mind that there are 2 versions of this Resource Pack! A Vanilla & [Vanilla Additions](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/texture-packs/justtimms-vanilla-additions) version.**
How does it work? It’s really simple. Make sure you have OptiFine installed, that the setting `Custom Items` is set to **`ON`** *(Video Settings -> Quality)* and that you have the resource pack `enabled`. If you want to get one of our custom items you need to get yourself an anvil and the required item. ***Example**: I want to get a pear. In order to get it I need to place an apple in the first slot and then change the name of it. It’s possible that some items require an enchantment. Then you need to put the right enchantment book in the middle slot.*
---------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
- 📘 Custom Items - 👕 Custom Armor - 🤿 Custom Headwear - 🎮 Collections
⚙️ Recommended settings Video Settings -> Quality... - Custom Items: **ON** Video Settings -> Animations... - Terrain Animated: **ON**
---------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------

You are **FREE** to: - Use this pack on your server. - Alter the pack for personal use. - Combine with other packs for personal use and play. - Use this pack in YouTube videos. (Credit is appreciated) You are **NOT** allowed to: - Claim ownership over the textures/models in this pack. - Reupload the entire resource pack elsewhere. - Redistribute unedited individual assets from the pack without permission and credit. - Redistribute edited assets from the pack without permission and credit. Thanks in advance. ---------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
